name: BRF Tools
author: QUILL Project
description: Bundled Quillin: user-configurable preferences for braille translation, page handling, and status bar display. Demonstrates multi-tab Quillin preferences. Requires the QUILL Braille Pack.

preferences.title: BRF Tools
preferences.description: Configure braille translation profiles, page handling, and status display for the QUILL Braille Pack.

tabs.title: Translation
tabs.description: Default translation profile and back-translation behavior.

settings.label: Default translation profile
settings.description: Profile used when no explicit profile is chosen. Must match a profile id in brf_profiles.json.

settings.label: Back-translation result label
settings.description: Prefix added to the tab name for every back-translation result to make clear it is not authoritative.

settings.label: Open translation result in a new tab
settings.description: When off, the result replaces the current document (not recommended).

settings.label: Announce braille page count after translation
settings.description: Speak how many braille pages the forward translation produced.

tabs.title: Page Handling
tabs.description: Cell width, line height, and page-break behavior.

settings.label: Cells per line
settings.description: Standard BRF line width. 40 cells is the most common interpoint page; 32 is common for single-sided.

settings.label: Lines per page
settings.description: Standard BRF page height. 25 lines is the most common interpoint page.

settings.label: Warn when a line exceeds the cell width
settings.description: Announce when a BRF line is wider than the configured cells-per-line.

settings.label: Normalize line endings to CRLF on save
settings.description: Force Windows CRLF in BRF output. Leave off unless your embosser requires it.

tabs.title: Status Bar
tabs.description: What the braille status cell shows while a BRF document is open.

settings.label: Show braille page number
settings.description: Include the current braille page in the status cell.

settings.label: Show line within braille page
settings.description: Include the current line within the page in the status cell.

settings.label: Show cell position within line
settings.description: Include the cursor's cell position within the current line.

settings.label: Show estimated print page
settings.description: Include the estimated print page number when available.

settings.label: Status verbosity
settings.description: How much detail the Read Braille Status command speaks.

settings.label: Log translation commands to the QUILL log
settings.description: Write each lou_translate invocation to the QUILL log file. Useful for diagnosing table problems.

settings.label: Translation timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Maximum time allowed for a single translation run before it is canceled.
